codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly addresses all feature requirements: credit limit request approve/reject uses /credit/limit-requests/{id}/approve|reject, credit override uses /credit/override-requests/{id}/approve|reject, export approvals load from /admin/approvals exportRequests (NOT /admin/exports/pending), and all 4 grouped sections are displayed with approve/reject actions. The old /admin/exports/pending endpoint reference (getPendingExports) has been removed. The ApprovalItem type has been updated to use 'originType' (matching backend AdminApprovalItemDto) instead of 'type'. One minor issue: the ApprovalsPage.tsx file-level comment block (lines 5-6) still references the old '/sales/credit-requests' endpoints, which is misleading though it doesn't affect runtime behavior since the actual API calls are correct. There is also a non-blocking concern about ExportApprovalsPage loading the entire approvals response when it only needs exportRequests.

issues.description: File-level JSDoc comment still references old endpoints: 'Credit Request → approve (POST /sales/credit-requests/{id}/approve)' and 'reject (POST /sales/credit-requests/{id}/reject)'. These are incorrect — the actual code uses /credit/limit-requests endpoints. This is misleading for developers reading the file but has no runtime impact since the actual adminApi calls are correct.

ExportApprovalsPage calls adminApi.getApprovals() which fetches the entire approvals response (creditRequests, payrollRuns, periodCloseRequests, exportRequests) but only uses exportRequests. This is wasteful — it fetches all approval types when only exports are needed. However, this is a reasonable trade-off given that: (a) the alternative (/admin/exports/pending) doesn't exist, (b) the ApprovalsPage already fetches the same endpoint, and (c) the data size is typically small. Not blocking.

summary: Feature implementation is solid and meets all requirements. The critical endpoint fixes are correct: credit limit requests now use /credit/limit-requests/{id}/approve|reject (not /sales/credit-requests), credit overrides use /credit/override-requests/{id}/approve|reject, period close uses /accounting/periods/{id}/approve-close|reject-close, and export approvals are loaded from the /admin/approvals response's exportRequests array (not from the non-existent /admin/exports/pending). The ApprovalItem type was correctly updated from 'type' to 'originType' to match the backend DTO. Approve/reject actions work for all 5 approval types. The code follows existing project patterns (adminApi module, DataTable, Badge, ConfirmDialog). Two minor non-blocking issues: (1) stale JSDoc comment in ApprovalsPage referencing old /sales/credit-requests endpoints, and (2) ExportApprovalsPage fetches the full approvals response when only exports are needed (acceptable trade-off).
